title: cerbera cuneifolia
intro: Cerbera cuneifolia, also known as the Kanantik or Pongam tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The leaves and seeds of the Cerbera cuneifolia plant are used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering benefits like reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Cerbera cuneifolia include infusions of the leaves, extracts of the seeds, and ointments made from the plant's oil, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
